535.desc: Trained in all ship weaponry systems, looting a captured vessel repairs up to 3 of your Ship's Weapon Components by 10% + Gunnery Skill

536.name: Overwhelming Pressure
536.desc: Extreme targeting lock forces one enemy craft to immediately land regardless of the current progress of their flight plan

537.name: Deck Discipline
537.desc: Purges your Ship's Crew of any Crippling Effects, Restores Gunnery Skill worth of Morale to 20 Crew

538.name: Relentless Stare
538.desc: When landing in a zone, the highest level crew member who attempts to abandon the ship reconsiders, but their salary increases by $2

540.name: Vector Assault
540.desc: Debuffs launched enemy Craft with -1 Initiative, -10% Dmg, -25% Craft Evasion for next 4 Turns

541.name: Salvage at Will
541.desc: While Salvaging at an Orbital, increase credit rewards by 20% + Gunnery Skill

542.name: Flak Attack
542.desc: If any ship weapons hit, this Crippling Attack causes Inability to Launch Craft, -15% to Hit Craft, -10% Shield for the next 3 Turns

543.name: Meteor Lockdown
543.desc: Defensive fire protects ship from a Meteor Storm in orbit of a system. Reduces ship and crew damage by Gunnery Skill

549.name: Warning Shots
549.desc: If any ship weapons hit, this Crippling Attack causes -20 Range Change, -10 Escape, +25 Morale Dmg/Turn for the next 3 Turns while debuffing our ship with -25% Dmg for next 2 Turns

550.name: Compelling Conscription
550.desc: When conscripting enemy to serve in your crew after a ship victory, new crew member starts with higher Morale and does not gain new negative Traits

594.name: Take Down
594.desc: Buffs Ship with +10% to Hit Craft, +50% Dmg to Craft, +5% Critical for next 3 Turns

595.name: Underport Bribe
595.desc: When refueling your ship, a small side bribe to the dockmaster grants a 15% + Negotiate Skill discount

596.name: Depot Sweep
596.desc: When refueling your ship, scouring the starport for better deals grants a 15% + Explore Skill discount

597.name: Covert Signals
597.desc: When encountering a Spy Captain, a subtle exchange of espionage protocols can reduce hostility

598.name: Fuel Bargain
598.desc: When refueling your ship, tough negotiation at the starport grants a 15% + Negotiation Skill discount

599.name: Keen Empath
599.desc: Knife-sharp senses grants Wisdom % chance to reveal a Contact's hidden Traits during any interaction where money changes hands

600.name: Blade Walker
600.desc: When entertaining in the spice hall, reduce price of Spicing to $0 and grant all revelers a Morale bonus equal to 30% of your Charisma

601.name: Whisper Dance
601.desc: When making Initiative Roll in Crew Combat, Buff yourself with +3 Initiative, +20% Melee Damage, -10% Parry, -10% Dodge, +15% Armor for 3 Turns (requires blade)

602.name: Confrontation Stance
602.desc: In crew combat, Removes all Debuffs; Buff yourself with +25% Melee Accuracy, +25% Melee Damage, +25% Critical, -15% Parry, -15% Dodge for 3 Turns, advances 1 slot (requires blade)

603.name: Feint
603.desc: In crew combat, Crippling Blade Attack with +50% Melee Accuracy, -60% Melee Damage, -40% Critical Chance; successful hit causes -4 Initiative, +6 Bleeding, -15% Parry, -15% Dodge for 3 Turns, advances 1 slot

604.name: Squall of Blades
604.desc: In crew combat, Crippling Blade Attack with +10% Melee Accuracy, +10% Critical; successful hit hits 2 targets and causes +16 Bleeding, -10% Deflection, -10% Armor for 3 Turns

605.name: Esteemed Guest
605.desc: When completing Mission steps that pick up or drop off a new Passenger on an urban zone, gain up to 20% + Negotiate Skill profit

606.name: Appeal to Honor
606.desc: Automatically passes a failed Negotiate test in any situation; including deep space travel, mutiny or during a mission

607.name: Murmurs of Renown
607.desc: Whenever completing a Blockade, Patrol or Spy mission step, gain a Charisma % chance to learn of a Contact of the mission's faction

608.name: Welcoming Rites
608.desc: When Recruiting, new crew member gains improved Attributes and you discover one of their hidden Traits.

609.name: Dramatic Performance
609.desc: When entertaining in the spice hall, reduce the price of Spicing to $0 and gain a Charisma % chance to learn about a Contact

610.name: Show of Confidence
610.desc: In crew combat, Removes all Debuffs; Buffs 3 targets with +10% All Accuracy, +10% Critical for 3 Turns and Restores (20 + 0 Blades) Morale (requires blade)

611.name: Forbidden Edge
611.desc: In crew combat, Buff yourself with +4 Initiative, +25% Melee Damage, +6 Bleeding, +35% Armor Piercing, +10% Critical for 3 Turns, advances 1 slot (requires blade)

612.name: Ritualized Retreat
612.desc: When accessing a Black Market, diffuse the situation to avoid security and any Cargo Lost card

613.name: Thousand Cut Dance
613.desc: In crew combat, Crippling Blade Attack with -50% Melee Damage, -25% Critical Chance; successful hit hits all enemies and causes +22 Bleeding, -20% Deflection, -10% Armor for 3 Turns

621.name: Mitigation Protocols
621.desc: When Exploring a Wild Zone, reroll any risk card

622.name: Sample Analysis
622.desc: Upon landing in a Wild Zone, 10% + Doctor Skill chance to generate Scientific Intel up to the Zone's Danger rating or your Explore Skill, whichever is greater

623.name: Dissected Scrutiny
623.desc: When Exploring a Wild Zone, increase all rewards by 10% + Doctor Skill

624.name: Trace Analysis
624.desc: While Salvaging at an Orbital, replace a risk card with Thesis Traces or Scientific Lead reward card

625.name: Accurate Predictions
625.desc: While Salvaging at an Orbital, remove a risk card

626.name: Signature Recording
626.desc: When encountering a xeno ship, scientific analysis of the scanner data points to new findings and grants Scientific Intel

627.name: Certain Knowledge
627.desc: When Exploring a Wild Zone, remove a risk card

628.name: Field Distortion Survey
628.desc: Protects the ship and crew from damage when flying through Radiation Storms (quadrant) and Ion Storms (system) while creating Scientific Intel up to your Command Skill

629.name: Amplified Assay
629.desc: Protects the ship and crew from damage when flying through Radiation Storms (quadrant) and Ion Storms (system) while granting additional Experience reward

630.name: Empirical Tell
630.desc: When landing in a Wild Zone, 10% + Explore Skill chance of discovering a previously unknown Rumor

631.name: Genetic Sequencing
631.desc: Upon victory in crew combat against xeno, vivisection and genetic sequencing produces up to Doctor Skill in Scientific Intel but max 10

632.name: Behavioral Analysis
632.desc: When salvaging a destroyed xeno ship in the void, gain up to Explorer Skill in Scientific Intel

633.name: Value Analysis
633.desc: Increases price for sold Scientific Records by 30% + Doctor Skill and Contact Influence gains are increased by Wisdom %

634.name: Laboratory Triage
634.desc: Saves a life during ship combat, blockade, spying, patrol, salvage or black market. Crew member is restored to HP equal to Doctor Skill + 3 x Medical Rating of onboard medical components

636.name: Earned Revelations
636.desc: While Exploring a Wild Zone, replace a risk card with Xenoform Traces or Abandoned Lab reward card

637.name: Sawbones Seeker
637.desc: While Exploring a Wild Zone, replace a risk card with Xenoform Traces or Abandoned Lab reward card

638.name: Contemplative View
638.desc: Increases price for sold Scientific Records by 30% + Electronics Skill and Contact Influence gains are increased by Wisdom %

664.name: Wrecking Ball
664.desc: a skillful attack on the enemy's comms leaves their crew in general disarray

665.name: Chain Reaction
665.desc: expertly chained explosions leave a wake of death and fires, causing Stealth Skill damage to 1 component

666.name: Afterthought Murder
666.desc: leaves the corridors and decks rigged with deadly traps; 4 enemy crew suffer 30 - 50 Damage plus Stealth Skill

667.name: Engine Disruption
667.desc: radiation bomb disrupts engine containment field causing Stealth Damage to ship's Engine if it has less than 25% Damage

668.name: Demolition Joy
668.desc: destructive rampage increases the number of Boarding Talents that can be used from 2 to 3

669.name: Razor-Sharp Tongue
669.desc: When accessing a Black Market, remove a risk card

670.name: Raiders Away
670.desc: Launch a Shuttle craft with a 4 Turn flight plan (launch, close, board, land) to make a boarding run against the enemy ship

671.name: Hull Slicer
671.desc: Launch a Shuttle craft with a 4 Turn flight plan (launch, close, board, land) to make a boarding run against the enemy ship

678.name: Smile of Guile
678.desc: When completing steps in a Mission with Stealth Skill, your carefully established cover mitigates your Reputation loss by up to Stealth Skill

679.name: Vindication Pact
679.desc: Discount price of Contact Pardon by Negotiate Skill up to maximum of 30%

688.name: Hota-Cored Shells
688.desc: fires explosive shells into already damaged areas of the ship, disabling up to 3 components which have at least 40% but less than 60% damage with up to 20% + Rifle Damage

694.name: Unconventional Tactics
694.desc: While Salvaging at an Orbital, remove a risk card

702.name: Deepstrike Detonator
702.desc: installs a overloaded shockwave detonator in a passageway, disabling 2-7 components which have at least 40% but less than 60% damage with up to 20% + Rifle Damage

703.name: Combat Debrief
703.desc: After a successful crew combat, debrief the crew granting Morale recovery and bonus Experience.

704.name: Asset Forfeiture
704.desc: Seize a defeated enemy ship during a Conflict at a local prize court (limited enemy types by Conflicts). Requires Military Rank or Edict and a tithe of 30% of the ship's value but strikes a blow in the Conflict, losing 70 Reputation with the enemy
